title: Rescue develop branch from trusted recent commits

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Audited develop against dev. Old untrusted develop-only history begins with four 2025 commits; now classifying the recent March 12-17 develop-only commits to preserve only meaningful code changes when rebuilding develop from dev.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed the stale 2025 develop-only commits do not overlap the current recent code paths. Proceeding with a clean rebuild of develop from dev in a temporary worktree, reapplying only current recent non-project files from develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created a rebuilt develop candidate from dev plus the recent non-project file set. Preserving the old remote develop as archive/develop-pre-rescue-20260318 before force-updating develop.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Force-updated origin/develop to the rebuilt commit d931c75a after saving the old branch at archive/develop-pre-rescue-20260318. Syncing the local checkout to the rebuilt develop and verifying CI next.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: CI on the rebuilt develop exposed a real lint issue, not a branch-history issue: explanation_analysis.py logs attachment_path inside the trace-summary exception block where that name is undefined. Fixing that in the rescue branch now.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed the explanation_analysis.py lint failure exposed by CI and pushed follow-up commit e0482a74 on top of the rebuilt develop. Watching the fresh develop CI run now.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Closed obsolete PR #126 after rebuilding develop from the trusted dev baseline. A fresh develop->main PR should be opened from the rescued branch once CI is green.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verifying the rebuilt develop head and current CI status before opening a fresh develop->main PR from the rescued branch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Rebuilt develop is green at e0482a74 and has zero open CodeQL alerts. Opening a fresh develop->main PR from the rescued branch now.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verifying whether the rescued develop branch still includes the recent landing-page repositioning changes before answering.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed branch rescue. origin/develop now points to e0482a74, the old branch was preserved at archive/develop-pre-rescue-20260318, PR #127 is open to merge the rescued develop into main, and CI runs 23227855698, 23227856866, and 23228151302 all passed on the rescued head.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User confirmed the current project/ Kanbus artifacts are intended to be versioned. Following up by adding the current project state onto develop as a separate commit.
